titleStmt.title: SII 37.494: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 494. (A.R. No. B 66 of 1942-43.) Dharanivarāhapuram, Tiruttani Taluk, Tiruttani District, Tamilnadu.

summary.p: Slab lying in the jungle to the south of the Kaṇṇimār (Saptamātris) shrine.
This is dated in the cyclic year Tāraṇa, Bhādrapada ba. 15. However, on the basis of palaeography, it may be assigned to the 17th century.

It records the tax (in kind) levied on grain harvested from the lands watered by the tank at Chirutaṇi, for its maintenance, by Baṁgāru Nāyaka, who was administering Chirutaṇisīma which was given over for administration by the king to Tūpakula Kṛishnappa-Nāyaka (ruler of Gingee).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī tāraṇa saṁvatsara bhādrapada ba 15 lu .
śrīmadrājādhirājarājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīvīraśrīraṁggarāya
layyadēvamahārāyalaṁggāru tū
pākula kriṣṇappanāyanivāriki yelubaḍi
ki pāliṁccina nārāyaṇavaraṁ śīmalō
ni cirutaṇi śīma yēlē baṁggāru
nāyaḍu cirutaṇi ceruvuku dharma
śilāśāsanaṁ veIṁccina vivaraṁ yī ce
ruvulōgalisina bā
yamūnū yī ceruvukiṁddi
modalaina pairu veṭē nē
lalakaṁttā vubhayarākini kolcina tū
muna kānike Aḍḍeḍu dhānyaṁ lekhkha vā
rānu yīceruvu dharmānaku yēṁṭēṁṭi
kiṁ Ā dra tu ḍi
kaṭṭaḍaśēśi dharmaśilāśāsanamu cēyiṁcināru .
yīdharma sottuku yavvarāśiṁccinānunnu vā
ru kāśilō braṁhatya śiśuhatya gōhatya śē
śinavāri pāpānakunnu mātṛkāmiga
tikini pōgalavāru .
Digital edition of SII 37.494 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
